_comment: Achievement art prompts for local generation. Style targets the EXISTING ach_real_life.jpg look: cinematic, theatrical, dark-with-gold, square. Each subject is themed to the achievement's song-pun name (not its unlock condition). Keep `style` + `negative` IDENTICAL across all items for a consistent set; only `subject` changes. Output → public/achievements/<id>.png (the app loads .png then .jpg).
style: cinematic concert photography, single dramatic theatrical spotlight, dark moody atmosphere, warm golden light and soft haze, deep rich shadows, ornate opera-house / grand-stage setting, elegant and reverent, volumetric light, highly detailed, 1:1 square composition
negative: text, words, letters, caption, watermark, signature, logo, ui, frame, border, cartoon, flat vector, anime, low quality, blurry, jpeg artifacts, deformed, extra limbs, extra fingers, washed out, oversaturated neon

items.name: Is This the Real Life?
items.subject: a lone operatic rock singer in a dramatic feathered tricorn hat and gold-embroidered black velvet cape, arms thrown wide mid-aria, silhouetted in a single overhead spotlight on a dark opera-house stage, Bohemian Rhapsody grandeur

items.name: Let It Be
items.subject: a solitary grand piano on a quiet darkened stage, one calm beam of golden light falling on the open keys, peaceful and still, a single empty chair, serene reverence

items.name: Magnum Opus
items.subject: a triumphant conductor seen from behind mid-flourish, baton raised, before a full glowing orchestra bathed in golden light, a faint laurel-wreath of light overhead, the crowning masterwork

items.name: Purple Rain
items.subject: a lone guitarist on a rain-soaked stage under deep purple stage light, rain streaking through the beams, a single warm-gold key light, soulful and dramatic

items.name: One More Time
items.subject: an encore moment on a grand stage, a single spotlight returning, a glowing spinning vinyl record motif in the light, raised hands of a darkened crowd below, warm gold glow, the call for one more

items.name: Seven Nation Army
items.subject: a lone drummer striking a great timpani in a thunderous pool of dramatic light, dust and reverberation in the air, bold and relentless rhythm, dark stage, gold rim light
